entry.title: 应用文写作 捆绑包
entry.content:
2010-2024题目分析

  • 文体：
    • 建议信：5*
    • 邀请信：3
    • 感谢信：2
    • 祝贺信：1
    • 投诉信：1
    • 求助信：1
    • 通知：1
  • 附加内容：
    • 介绍：8
    • 邀请：2
    • 建议：2
    • 求助：1
    • 感谢：1

*建议信连续两年考察，今年再出的概率不大。

建议信

假如你是李华。某中学生英语报社准备增设一个Environmental Protection的栏目，为此报社就报道内容与方式向读者征求建议。请你根据以下提示给编辑写封信，提出你的建议：

  1. 报道内容广泛；
  2. 报道应包括原因、危害，并重点突出应对方法；
  3. 语言简单易懂，适合更多的读者。

Dear editor,

 I'm glad to know from your paper that you are asking readers for suggestions on your new section—Environmental Protection. The suggestions I can come up with are as follows:

 The section had better cover a wide range of environmental concerns. Meanwhile, each report is supposed to include causes, effects and more importantly, effective measures, thus making the public aware that everyone should and can do something to deal with environmental problems. Besides, reports should be written in simple English in order to attract as many readers as possible.

 I'd appreciate it if you could take my advice into account.

Yours truly,
Li Hua

假定你是李华，新落成的外文书店为增加访客量现向市民征求建议，请给书店经理Mr. Davis写一封建议信，内容包括：

  1. 拥有宽敞的空间以提供良好的阅读体验；
  2. 提供咨询、讲座等服务；
  3. 其他建议（至少一条）。

Dear Mr. Davis,

 Congratulations on your newly-opened bookstore and I feel it an honor to offer you some suggestions on how to increase the popularity of your store.

 Firstly, spacious room that provides readers with a cozy and agreeable/pleasant reading environment is essential so as to ensure a pleasant/an agreeable and satisfactory reading experience. Secondly, services like consultation and lectures are highly recommended, with which consumers can make more proper choices of books and their interest in reading might be stimulated as well. In addition, it is also a wise option to set up a coffee and snack section to add more fun to the bookstore.

 Hope you'll find my suggestions useful and wish you great success in your business.

Yours sincerely,
Li Hua

邀请信

假定你是李华，校学生会主席。即将高中毕业，你代表全体高三学生邀请外教Jeff来参加毕业典礼。

  1. 时间：6月6日 上午9：00；地点：学校音乐厅；
  2. 介绍毕业典礼的活动；
  3. 希望Jeff能够发表简短的演讲。

Dear Jeff,

 I am Li Hua, chairman of the Students' Union. I'm writing to invite you to attend our graduation ceremony.

 As scheduled, the ceremony is to be held in the school Music Hall at 9:00 am, on June 6th. It will start with the School Anthem, which is followed by various performances ranging from dances to martial arts. Moreover, videos made by students themselves will bring the vivid recollections of past school life into visual reality. Should our graduation ceremony by ended with your speech, it would do us a great honor.

 I would appreciate it should you reply at your earliest convenience.

Yours,
Li Hua

请写一封信邀请你的英语外教Smith一同前往参观国际非物质文化遗产博览园the International Intangible Cultural Park。内容如下：

  1. 时间安排：12月10日8点校门口集合乘大巴前往,下午3点返回。
  2. 活动内容:随导游参观;中午野餐(自备)。

Dear Smith,

 To have a better understanding of what we learned about cultural heritage in English class, we have arranged a visit to the International Intangible Cultural Park. Therefore, I wonder if you are interested to go with us, during which we can have a feast of amazing Chinese culture.

 As has been scheduled, we will gather and set off/out at the school gate at 8:00, December 10 and return at 15:00. Upon our arrival, a guide will introduce us those remarkable pasts in different aspects of people's life when showing us around the park. At lunchtime, we'll be enjoying our picnic prepared in advance on the grass, chatting and having fun.

 We would feel greatly honored and pleased should you accept the invitation. I am looking forward to your reply at your earliest convenience.

Yours,
Li Hua

感谢信

假设你是李华，梁教授去年六月推荐你去悉尼大学深造，现在你已经被悉尼大学化学学院录取，请写封信向梁教授表示感谢。

Dear Professor Liang,

 I am writing to extend my gratitude to you because with your assistance I have been admitted to the Chemistry Department of Sydney University.

 Last June, when I applied to become a graduate student of Sydney University, you really offered me a lot of valuable help. Not only did you write a recommendation for me to Professor Wells who works in the Sydney University, but also gave me careful and patient instructions on how to fill the application forms and write the application letters.

 It is your unreserved help that enables me to obtain this splendid opportunity of further education. For the following two years I will study hard to reciprocate/pay back your sincere help and try my best to live up to your expectations with excellent grades.

Yours,
Li Hua

假如你叫李明,在伦敦学习期间,你待在Jonathan的家里。请你给Jonathan 写一封电子邮件表示感谢,并邀请他明年暑假来你家。

内容要点:

  1. 感谢Jonathan让你住在他家;
  2. 他们给你创造了一个很好的家庭氛围;
  3. 明年你将中学毕业,届时你将有两个月的假期,你和家人诚邀Jonathan暑期来南京度假。

Dear Jonathan,

 I can't tell you how much I appreciate your kindness in inviting me to live in your home while I was in London. All of you not only treated me as a family member but also tried your best to create a warm and harmonious home atmosphere for me. I shall never forget and shall always treasure the unforgettable time.

 Next summer, I will graduate from senior high school and there will be a two-month holiday before I go to university, so my parents and I sincerely invite you to come to Nanjing for holiday. There are a lot of beautiful and historic places in my hometown. I'm sure you will fall in love with it and we will definitely have a nice time then.

 I'm looking forward to your reply. Please send my best regards to your parents!

Yours,
Li Ming

祝贺信

假如你是李华，你的英国好友George即将参加"汉语桥"决赛。他来信询问学习汉语的方法，现在请你用英文给他回信。

内容要点包括：

  1. 祝贺进入决赛；
  2. 传授学习方法；
  3. 表达美好祝愿。

Dear George，

 Congratulations to you on your entering the final of Chinese Bridge. I am more than glad to offer some advice on how to learn Chinese well, which hopefully can help you gain a good result in the coming competition.

 In order to acquire a good knowledge of Chinese culture, you are supposed to read more books including novels. Consulting a dictionary is undoubtedly a good way to enlarge your vocabulary and grasp its usages. If possible, make full use of your time to listen, speak because practice makes perfect.

 Congratulations again and best wishes for your brilliant future.

Yours,
Li Hua

假定你是李华，你的英国朋友Steve被当地一所孔子学院录取，即将入学，不知道如何作学业方面的准备。请你给他写封邮件。

内容包括：

  1. 表示祝贺；
  2. 你的建议；
  3. 表达祝愿。

Dear Steve，

 I'm delighted to learn that you've been admitted to the Confucius Institute. Congratulations! Here, I'd like to share how to get prepared for the coming study there.

 First, you need to enlarge your Chinese vocabulary, thus potentially helping you better fit into the class. Also, learning some knowledge of Confucius in advance will surely help you catch a glimpse of his thoughts and ideas, which are deeply rooted in the Chinese culture but quite different from what you hold.

 I hope you'll harvest a lot in the Confucius Institute and hopefully be a man with a global vision. May everything go well with you!

Yours,
Li Hua

投诉信

假如你是李华，上周你在海外购物网站Amazon上购买了一个书包，但是寄到后发现存在质量 问题，请你给该网站负责人Smith先生写一封信，内容包括：

  1. 反映质量问题；
  2. 你的诉求。

Dear Smith,

 I am Li Hua, a regular customer of Amazon. I'm sorry to trouble you, but I have to make a complaint about the school bag I purchased last week.

 When receiving the school bag, I was disappointed to find the color was quite different from what was shown in the advertisement. What also annoyed me was that there were several black spots on the bag, which couldn't be wiped away. For the reasons above, I strongly demand either the school bag be exchanged or I be compensated with full refund.

 Looking forward to your prompt reply.

Yours sincerely,
Li Hua

假如你是李华，昨天在商场购买了一台电风扇，回家后发现它不能运转。你回到店里与营业员交涉时，该营业员对你的态度恶劣，对你提出的问题不予受理。请你为此向经理写一封投诉信。

Dear Manager,

 I feel sorry to trouble you but I am afraid that I have to make a complaint.

 Yesterday I bought an electric fan in your shop, but when I got home and turned it on, it didn't work. So I took it back and talked to the assistant about the problem. To my surprise, instead of helping me solve the problem, the man, in a rude manner, refused to examine it.

 Generally, your shop is well-known for good service and that is why I bought the electric fan in your shop. I was really upset to find that such a thing should have occurred in your shop.

 I am waiting for a reasonable explanation and expecting an early reply.

Sincerely yours,
Li Hua

求助信

假定你是校英语俱乐部负责人李华,你校即将举行"英语角"活动，你想求助于你的朋友一某国际高中学生会主席Jack帮忙选派5位学生参加活动。请给Jack写一封电子邮信, 内容包括：

  1. 活动时间；
  2. 活动主题；
  3. 希望选派什么样的学生。

Dear Jack,

 The English Corner of our school is scheduled for January 4th. To make it more attractive, I'm writing to ask you if you could arrange for five students of your school to join us.

 As the topic will be "Difference between Chinese and American Education", it would be great if the five students were familiar with the American education system. I'm absolutely sure that your support will add much vitality to the event and guarantee its success.

 Your timely reply will be highly appreciated.

Yours,
Li Hua

假定你是李华，当前你在英语学习方面遇到了一些问题。于是你向你校的外籍老师Tom写一封求助信寻求帮助。要点如下：

  1. 本人简介；
  2. 求助内容；
  3. 希望得到Tom的帮助。

Dear Tom,

 I'm Li Hua, a Senior 3 student in your school. I am writing to ask you to do me a favor for I find it a headache for me to learn English now.

 At present, as for English, I am faced with two main problems. First of all, I find it extremely challenging to learn vocabulary by heart and apply them to practical use. In addition, I feel ants in pants when speaking English in public. Therefore, I do hope you could offer me some advice on how to remember words and how to overcome my fear of speaking English. I'm sorry for the convenience I have caused to you.

 I would appreciate it should you offer me your timely help.

 Looking forward to your reply.

Yours,
Li Hua

通知

有的把日期写在标题下一行，有的把日期写在文末，应该都行吧。

反正写了就行。

假定你是李华，在春节来临之际，为了与来访的美国学生共度一个传统中国年，你校学生会将组织一场新春晚会。请你代表学生会用英语写一则书面通知，主要内容包括：

  1. 时间、地点：2020年1月2日、学校音乐厅；
  2. 简要说明晩会节目；
  3. 欢迎中美学生积极参与。

Notice

Monday, June 15

 To celebrate the arrival of Spring Festival and immerse our American friends in an authentic Chinese tradition festive custom, our school is to hold a Spring Festival Gala on January 20, 2020 at the school music hall. A variety of performances will be on the stage, ranging from dancing and singing in contemporary art style to traditional musical instrument performance with ancient elegance. What's more, a drama based on Shakespeare's Hamlet will be carried out. All our students and American guests are welcome to participate and display diverse cultures.

Students' Union

假定你是某国际学校的学生会主席李华，你校最近将组织一批志愿者到火车站提供服务。请你以学生会的名义用英语写一则书面通知，内容主要包括：

  1. 时间：11月18日(星期日)，上午8:00-11:00
  2. 地点：南京火车站
  3. 活动内容：捡垃圾、信息咨询、帮助使用自助售票机等
  4. 注意事项

Notice

 To help students learn more about sharing, volunteers in our school will be organized to offer service at Nanjing Railway Station.

 The activity will be held from 8 a.m. to 11 a.m. this Sunday morning on November 18th . Volunteers can offer a variety of services. Some can pick up rubbish on the ground and provide information for passengers. Some can help the passengers with heavy baggage. In addition, some volunteers can teach passengers how to use the ticket vending machine.

 Please remember to come to the station on time. Welcome to join us, and we believe you will benefit a lot from this activity.

Student Council

Monday, June 15

会议纪要

2025考纲新加入内容。

但是第一年加一般不会第一年考吧。看一眼知道格式就行了。

Suppose your class held a meeting to discuss how to prevent food waste in daily life. Please write the minutes for the meeting. Your minutes should include:

  1. Basic information about the discussion
  2. Issues and solutions raised in the discussion

Minutes

Date: 15th June, 2024
Time: 04:04 pm
Duration: 1 hour
Venue: Room 114
Present: Professor Sky and all classmates

 This meeting was for the purpose of discussing how to prevent food waste in everyday life and finally all participants came to the same conclusion.

 Professor Sky raised the question and pointed out that compared with the past, we enjoy a richer life and thus an increasing number of youngsters do not cherish food. Then, all classmates agreed that this phenomenon is particularly worth attention. We deemed that it is of great necessity for us to stop wasting not only food, but also time, electricity, water and the like.

 The conclusion is that we are supposed to take immediate actions, to prevent food waste in daily life, such as only buying what we need and not throwing away leftovers.

Minutes Recorder: Li Ming

后记

2024.12.21

考的是邀请信+介绍。Classic Chinese Novel写了个西游记上去
entry.summary: 旧瓶装新酒。

entry.title: 图表作文模板
entry.content:
搭配 英语作文句式 食用效果更佳

First Paragraph 第一段

Pie Charts 饼图

 Consisting of 板块数量 sections, the pie chart above has clearly shown 翻译图表中的中文短语, in which 占比最高的板块名称 has played a significant role, accounting for 该板块的具体百分比, with 剩余板块名称1, 剩余板块名称2, and 剩余板块名称3 covering 剩余板块名称1的具体百分比, 剩余板块名称2的具体百分比, and 剩余板块名称3的具体百分比 respectively.

开头也可换成 As is shown in the 图表名称, …

 Consisting of 5 sections, the pie chart above has clearly shown the factors consumers pay attention to when choosing a restaurant in one city in 2017, in which specialty has played a significant role, accounting for 36.3%, with service, environment, and price covering 26.8%, 23.8%, and 8.4% respectively.

Bar Charts and Line Charts 柱状图与线图

 What we can see is a bar/line chart about 翻译图表中的中文, in which 上升数据的名称 is on the rapid/moderate rise from 起点数据+年份 to 终点数据+年份, while ①下降数据名称 appears to show a downward trend. //②持平数据名称 has remained almost unchanged. // ③另一组上升数据的名称 has also increased rapidly/moderately/accordingly.

 What we can see is a bar chart about the changes of the population in both rural and urban areas in China over the past 20 years, in which the number of people living in cities is on the rapid rise from 300 million in 1990 to over 600 million in 2010, while the number of those living in countryside appears to show a downward trend.

 What we can see is a line chart about the number of museums and their visitors in our country from 2013 to 2015, in which the number of visitors is on the rapid rise from 637.8 million in 2013 to 781.1 million in 2015, while that of museum has also increased accordingly.

Table 表格

 Clearly shown in this table is 翻译图表中的中文. We can see that 第一列中占比最高的数据名称A take a leading position of 数据名称A在该列的具体数据 in the column of 列1的名称, while the percentage of 该列中占比最低的数据名称B is merely/literally 数据名称B在该列中的具体数据. By contrast, only 数据名称A在列2的具体数据 of the former and up to 数据名称B在列2的具体数据 of the latter marked their answers(sb.)//have been marked (sth.) in the column of 列2的名称.

 Clearly shown in this table is the result of a survey on employees' satisfaction degree toward their jobs in one company. We can see that the people over 50 years old take a leading position of 40% in the column of satisfaction, while the percentage of the people from 41 to 50 years old is literally 0%. By contrast, only 10% of the former and up to 64% of the latter marked their answers in the column of dissatisfaction.

Second Paragraph 第二段

 The following interpretations may offer a clue to have a better understanding of such figures. First, the advance in both economic and culture development of our country has made a growing number of people be more aware of 简化版中文, which is closely related to our everyday life. Second, with all the crucial data included in this 图表类型 , 简化版中文 is also an indicator indispensible when it comes to evaluating the progress we have made to changes lives for the better over the past few years. Third, though rather encouraging, the figures in this 图表类型 will by no means put an end to our striving for the building of an overall well-off society.

 The following interpretations may offer a clue to have a better understanding of such figures. First, the advance in both economic and culture development of our country has made a growing number of people be more aware of the market share of domestic brands, which is closely related to our everyday life. Second, with all the crucial data included in this bar chart, the market share of domestic brands is also an indicator indispensible when it comes to evaluating the progress we have made to changes lives for the better over the past few years. Third, though rather encouraging, the figures in this bar chart will by no means put an end to our striving for the building of an overall well-off society.

Ending Paragraph 结尾段

Positive 积极正面

 In a nutshell, I will personally regard such figures as a manifestation of the efforts we have made in the past few years, which also delivers a message loud and clear ---①our people's living standard has been greatly improved./②the comprehensive national strength of our country has been considerably enhanced.

Negative 消极负面

 To sum up, such figures, in my point of view, can serve as a timely reminder that closer attention has to be paid to 简化版中文, and there is still much room for further improvement. Only through continuous perfection, can we make a difference.

总结

真是公公又式式啊你们有没有像我一样公式的作文啊我就想问
entry.summary: 天下文章一大抄，看你会抄不会抄。
